---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Adventure"
description: "Running, climbing, and trail adventures — training toward a sub-3:30 marathon. (Private personal-projects page.)"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: _personal-head.html
---

::: {.section-label}
Personal projects
:::
# adventure {.section-title}

Running, climbing, botanising, and as much time as possible out the door. Right now that means building toward a sub-3:30 marathon. Routes, races, and trail notes will collect here.

::: {.log}

::: {.log-entry}
### The road to sub-3:30
[In training]{.log-meta}
Base miles, long runs, and the slow work of chasing a sub-3:30 marathon. Training notes and the race report will land here.
:::

:::

::: {.personal-link}
*More logs coming soon.* &nbsp; · &nbsp; [← Back to personal projects](personal.html)
:::
